collection_method.notes: All 5000 target reviews were successfully collected. The app had sufficient reviews available to meet the upper limit of the required range (1000-5000).

steps: Removed duplicate reviews based on exact text match
Removed empty or extremely short reviews (fewer than 3 words after cleaning)
Converted numbers to their English word equivalents using num2words
Normalized whitespace (collapsed multiple spaces and newlines)
Removed English stop words using NLTK stopwords corpus
Lemmatized tokens using spaCy en_core_web_sm model
